messages.content: I need information regarding: Paddy Harvest Timing Advice
Paddy should be harvested when 80-85% of the grains turn golden yellow. Ensure moisture content is around 20-25% to avoid grain breakage. Timely harvesting improves yield and quality.

messages.content: I need information regarding: Rice Blast Disease Treatment
Rice blast disease can be controlled by using resistant varieties and applying fungicides like Tricyclazole. Maintain proper spacing and avoid excess nitrogen fertilizer.
messages.thoughtSummary: Fetching past insights based on your query:

messages.content: I need information regarding: Best Fertilizer for Paddy Growth
For paddy, apply a balanced dose of NPK (Nitrogen, Phosphorus, Potassium). Split nitrogen application into stages-baseline, tillering, and panicle initiation-for best results.

messages.content: I need information regarding: Soil NPK Levels Improvement Tips
Improving soil NPK levels can be done by adding organic compost, green manure, and balanced fertilizers. Soil testing is recommended before application.

messages.content: I need information regarding: Yellow Leaves in Wheat Causes
Yellowing in wheat may be due to nitrogen deficiency or fungal infection. Apply urea if deficiency is confirmed, and ensure proper drainage to prevent disease.

messages.content: I need information regarding: Organic Farming Methods for Vegetables
Organic farming involves using natural inputs like compost, vermicompost, and biofertilizers. Crop rotation and biological pest control are key practices.

messages.content: I need information regarding: Weather Forecast for Crop Planning
Weather plays a crucial role in farming. Monitor rainfall and temperature regularly to plan irrigation, fertilization, and harvesting activities effectively.

messages.content: I need information regarding: Current Market Price of Tomatoes
Market prices vary by mandi and quality. It is advisable to check nearby markets or government portals like Agmarknet for real-time pricing before selling.

messages.content: I need information regarding: Crop Rotation Benefits Explained
Crop rotation improves soil fertility and reduces pests. Rotating legumes with cereals helps fix nitrogen and improves overall yield.
